description: A taxpayer's e-filed return was rejected because a dependent's Social Security Number and last name do not match IRS records.

nodes.task_description: Identify the rejection code from the e-file system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the specific code indicating a dependent SSN/name mismatch.

nodes.task_description: Verify the dependent's name and SSN with the taxpayer, checking against the Social Security card.

expected_outcome.value: Agent discovers a typo was made when entering the dependent's last name.

nodes.task_description: Correct the information in the tax return and re-transmit the e-file.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully corrects the error and resubmits the return.
